message:
feat: Multi-agent implementation of approval, wait, robot commands, and config expansion

Major additions from collaborative multi-agent development:
- approval.rs: New approval workflow module
- wait.rs: Wait-for pattern detection and state machine
- config.rs: Extended configuration with paths and effective config
- policy.rs: Expanded policy engine with authorization and redaction
- storage.rs: Enhanced storage with sessions, events, and async operations
- wezterm.rs: Added send_control and unicode handling
- main.rs: Robot subcommand system for agent-friendly JSON interface

Also includes clippy fixes and .gitignore update for .ntm/ directory.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
